name: Pumpkin Apple Waffles
recipeIngredient: 1 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions: Prepare waffle iron with cooking spray and heat up. In a mixing bowl, combine pumpkin, apples, egg whites, milk, and applesauce. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, ginger, and cloves. Add wet ingredients to dry ingredients just until moistened. Pour enough batter into the waffle iron to fill two-thirds of it. Cook until crisp and golden brown. Set aside. Repeat with remaining batter.
